task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N110 acceptance-criteria-generation artifact. The ground truth is at: 验收标准.csv (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured
